{{Quote|We are doubly blessed. Ground Champion Cheriss ke Hanadi, not content with a single victory this day, accepts a title challenge from Lord Pilot Phalle ke Seiufere.|Cartann announcer|<ref name="X-Wing: SOA" />}}
'''Phalle ke Seiufere''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[blastsword]] duelist from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. ke Seiufere was the second challenger of [[Cartann Ground Champion]] [[Cheriss ke Hanadi]] for her title before the [[perator]]'s announcement of world government for Adumar.

ke Seiufere lost to ke Hanadi after a long match, incurring several blastsword wounds. He survived however as ke Hanadi decided to spare him.

==Behind the scenes==
Phalle ke Seiufere is a character created by author [[Aaron Allston]] for the [[1999]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'', the ninth novel in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''X-Wing'']] series.<ref name="X-Wing: SOA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
